products.title: Our Products
products.description: Shop farm-fresh desi chicken, country eggs and rabbit meat from Alliance Street Organic Farms, Goa. No antibiotics, no hormones — ever.
products.keywords: buy desi chicken goa, fresh country eggs goa, rabbit meat goa, organic products india
products.ogTitle: Farm-Fresh Products | Alliance Street Organic Farms
products.ogDescription: Desi chicken, country eggs and rabbit meat — farmed ethically in Goa with no antibiotics or hormones.

breeds.title: Native Chicken Breeds
breeds.description: We raise Kadaknath, Aseel, and other indigenous desi chicken breeds in Goa — prized for superior meat quality, flavour, and natural nutrition.
breeds.keywords: kadaknath chicken goa, aseel chicken india, desi breeds goa, native poultry india
breeds.ogTitle: Indigenous Chicken Breeds | Alliance Street Organic Farms
breeds.ogDescription: Kadaknath, Aseel & native desi breeds raised free-range in Goa. Unmatched flavour, zero chemicals.

eggs.title: Farm-Fresh Desi Eggs
eggs.description: Buy country chicken eggs from free-range desi hens in Goa. Higher Omega-3, Vitamin D & antioxidants — vastly superior to commercial cage eggs.
eggs.keywords: country eggs goa, desi eggs india, free range eggs goa, organic eggs goa, buy farm eggs india
eggs.ogTitle: Desi Country Eggs | Alliance Street Organic Farms
eggs.ogDescription: Free-range desi eggs from Goa — richer in Omega-3, Vitamin D & protein than any commercial egg. 100% natural.

philosophy.title: Why Organic?
philosophy.description: Discover why choosing organic, free-range, chemical-free food from Alliance Street Organic Farms is better for your family, your health, and the planet.
philosophy.keywords: why organic food, benefits organic farming, chemical free food india, organic vs commercial food
philosophy.ogTitle: Why Organic? | Alliance Street Organic Farms
philosophy.ogDescription: Free-range, antibiotic-free, ethically raised — find out why organic food from our Goa farm makes a real difference.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn the story of Alliance Street Organic Farms — founded in 2024 in Goa, committed to ethical, antibiotic-free, sustainable farming of native livestock.
about.keywords: alliance street organic farms goa, organic farm story goa, about organic farm india
about.ogTitle: About Alliance Street Organic Farms | Goa, India
about.ogDescription: Founded in 2024 in Goa, we raise native livestock without antibiotics or hormones — pure food, grown with pride.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Meet the founders of Alliance Street Organic Farms — Shaukin Phaterpekar & Stallone Shaikh — the people behind Goa's cleanest organic farm.
team.keywords: alliance street organic farms founders, shaukin phaterpekar, stallone shaikh, goa organic farm team
team.ogTitle: Meet Our Founders | Alliance Street Organic Farms
team.ogDescription: Shaukin & Stallone built Alliance Street Organic Farms on friendship, ethical farming, and a commitment to clean food for every Goan family.

contact.title: Order Now
contact.description: Order farm-fresh desi chicken, country eggs & rabbit meat directly from Alliance Street Organic Farms in Goa. WhatsApp or call us today.
contact.keywords: order organic food goa, buy farm fresh food goa, contact alliance street organic farms

contact.ogDescription: Get farm-fresh organic food delivered in Goa. WhatsApp or call Alliance Street Organic Farms directly — no middlemen.
